title: Pet Munchies Chicken Twists Dog Treats, Value Pack Grain Free Dental Sticks with Natural Real Meat, Low in Fat and High in Protein 290g (Pack of 3)
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL CHICKEN: This gourmet dental treat is made with succulent twists of 100% natural, human-grade chicken breast meat wrapped around a rawhide stick - delicately roasted to perfection

HEALTHY & JUNK-FREE: Our chicken twists contain no artificial colours or flavours, are naturally high in protein, grain and gluten free and low in fat & salt making them the perfect treat to feed your four legged friends
FOR HEALTHY TEETH & GUMS: Designed to satisfy your dogs natural instinct to chew, helping to remove tartar and plaque to support good oral health

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our chicken twists are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!
description: Product Description 0 Indications All Life Stages Ingredients All-Natural Directions 0 Safety Warning The packet contains a deoxidiser sachet, this must be disgarded and not eaten by animals or humans. Box Contains Pet Munchies Chicken Twists 290g (Pack of 3) See more
